text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe vs. Agnes Tachyon—an
unthinkable match-up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate showdown between peers is about to
unfold at the senior Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Returning after a long period of rest. Such asinine
phrasing. Don't they realize that time passes
differently for everyone?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At this very moment, I'm perfect. The best I've
ever been, Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is that... so? But how could I...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WUHHH!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No... I can see it too. I can tell that you're in top
form.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
For a moment just now, I saw my friend... She
overlapped with you... and that's proof enough.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Nothing like this has ever happened before... All this time, have I been chasing you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it either... There's something else...
far beyond the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she's getting at, but it looks like
Manhattan Cafe feels some sort of connection
with her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, there's something I have to say to you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have
made it this far.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And I'm glad... that I got to race against you once
more.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. Heh heh heh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon? Did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're glad that you get to race against me? How
do you think I got here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why, you're the one who made it happen. Are you not?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I came back because you prized the door open
for me... You even saved me time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was my classic year, and after the Satsuki Sho, I
quit racing in order to become your advisor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I destroyed the hands of the clock. I didn't just
stop them in place. I chose to destroy them.
Deliberately.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thought that'd stop them from bothering me.
After all, there was no particular need for me to
go on my own.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Then came the summer of senior year, and the
Takarazuka Kinen. There, you stood at the
doorway to the frontier I'd hypothesized.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hearing you speak of the light you saw... It drove
my feelings into a sheer frenzy! But I'd already
made my decision a year earlier.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I had two options. Either fly into a tantrum like a
child, knowing I'd never get there myself, or...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Pretend I hadn't destroyed the hands of the
clock, and imagine I'd only stopped them.
Thankfully, science was there for me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There are some things even science can't do. But
that wasn't the issue. The problem was that I had
no reason to utilize science.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And it was because... I'd obtained the key. And the key was emotion—emotion roused by unforeseen failure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I took action. I threw everything away.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I researched my own body to within an inch of its
life, then smashed through the nigh-indestructible
wall that stood before me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And now, I stand before you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's strange. In my brain, I feel the desire to run. And that desire has driven my legs to tread this earth. This... sensation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I feel like... I'm living. Living the life I thought I'd
thrown away. The Umamusume life.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This excitement has helped me realize. All I needed was to get there myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Cafe. Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I understand my true nature now. There's no
escaping it. I'm an Umamusume, plain and simple.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And, though I'm grateful, I cannot forgive you,
Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That world you gave me a glimpse of is mine for
the taking! I won't let you get there first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't say I understand everything she's said. But
if nothing else, I at least know how Agnes
Tachyon really feels now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon... I'm not very good with words...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But there's no getting around it... I truly believe that you are my rival...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, is that so? I consider you a rival as well...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. That's not it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Something isn't clicking. You've competed
against me, you've joined forces with me, and
you've taken good care of me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Reality's complicated, you see.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Why... can't we just be rivals? I only just worked
up the courage to accept that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, actually, I've got just the word.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe. You're quite the mysterious individual, and
you're not the easiest to get a handle on, but
you've been my guide.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The word for what you are to me is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Run as you please. And chase her. Chase your
own friend.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I don't intend to run in the same races as you. I'll be engaging in a pursuit of my own—after my friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon... Good... Come after me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But... I'll be staying in the lead. No matter what,
I'll reach where I'm heading and go beyond still!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They've been chasing very different things, and
though they've come this far together, their paths
won't cross again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With different destinations in mind, they each
head for the starting gates.
